onboarding_tip.message: I'll check every link you see. Dangerous ones get a red mark. Try right-clicking a link → "Check with Cleanway".

recent_empty.message: Nothing found yet — browse normally, I'm watching.

trust_footer.message: Your data never leaves this device

block_explanation.message: $DOMAIN$ is pretending to be someone else so it can steal your information.

block_scheme_heading.message: How scammers use sites like this:

block_scheme_step1.message: You will be asked for your password or bank details

block_scheme_step2.message: The scammer steals what you type

block_scheme_step3.message: They drain your account or steal your identity

block_proceed_button.message: I understand the risk — open anyway

block_trust_footer.message: Protected by Cleanway. Your data stays on your device.

welcome_hero_subtitle.message: Every link you see is being checked. Dangerous ones will be blocked automatically.

welcome_step1_desc.message: Every page, every link. Green badge means safe. Red means scam.

welcome_step2_desc.message: We only check domain names. Your browsing history never leaves this device.

welcome_step3_desc.message: Most checks happen on your device in under a second. Just browse normally.

welcome_step4_desc.message: Protect parents, kids, grandparents with one plan. Different modes for each.

welcome_cta_scan.message: Scan my inbox for hidden scams

welcome_trust_footer.message: Free forever for blocking. Your data never leaves this device.
